name: Lumen Method Compliance Check
formula_reference: CIBSE SLL Code for Lighting 2012; Approved Document L Table 6.1
implementation_note: Deterministic Python: verifies achieved illuminance E = (N × Φ × UF × MF) / A against target lux; if total_load_w supplied, also runs Part L efficacy check (lm/W vs room_type target).
